title: Smoky Corn Cakes with Creamy Salsa
description: A twist on traditional corn cakes, these smoky patties are served with a creamy and tangy salsa. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine masarepa, onion, smoky, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 4-6 patties.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add patties to the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes per side.
While the patties are cooking, mix together creamy, lime juice, and cilantro in a bowl.
Add diced tomato to the bowl and mix well.
Serve patties with creamy salsa on top.
